issue_title: Fix Address component copying address to clipboard
issue_body_preview:
When the Address component is inside a dialog (like the one created when using a DaisyUI modal), the copy to the clipboard for the address is not working.

You can try it at https://clipboard-broken.vercel.app/ , open the modal, and try to copy the address. The address will not be copied to the cl
test_description_zh: 在页面中打开一个 DaisyUI 模态框（dialog），模态框内包含 Address 组件，点击 Address 组件上的复制地址按钮/图标，然后尝试粘贴到其他输入框中，验证剪贴板是否成功复制了地址。
expected_result_zh: 点击 Address 组件的复制功能后，地址应成功复制到剪贴板，粘贴时能正确显示完整的以太坊地址。即使 Address 组件位于 DaisyUI 模态框（dialog）内部，复制功能也应正常工作。
